source_pr.title: planner: update the structure of the plan cache key
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #31056

Problem Summary: update the structure of the plan cache key

### What is changed and how it works?

The first PR to split https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/31687 to multiple smaller PRs and merge them into the Master.

No logical change, just refactor, update the structure of the plan cache key: replacing `connID` with `stmtText`.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

failure_signature: t.Skip("unstable, skip it and fix it before 20210705")
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Plan-cache/lease/background refresh can introduce timing-dependent behavior. This PR stabilizes it by: planner: update the structure of the plan cache key.
fix_pattern: planner: update the structure of the plan cache key
